description:
You are acting as a localization engineer who has just received a request to create an initial French (fr_FR) translation stub for a software project and register that change in the project log.

Current workspace layout  
/home/user/localization/  
├── templates/  
│   └── messages.pot  
└── (nothing else yet)

1. Create the directory /home/user/localization/fr_FR so that it exactly contains a single file called messages.po once you are done.  
2. Copy the template file /home/user/localization/templates/messages.pot into /home/user/localization/fr_FR/messages.po.  
3. Inside the newly-created /home/user/localization/fr_FR/messages.po file, update the “Project-Id-Version” header so it reads exactly:  
   Project-Id-Version: 1.3  
   • If the header already exists, replace its value (do not leave duplicates).  
   • If it is missing, insert it as the first non-blank line of the file.  
4. Append a single-line entry to the end of a plain-text log file called /home/user/localization/update.log (create the file if it does not yet exist) with the following exact text and nothing else:  
   2023-07-01 10:00 Updated fr_FR translation to version 1.3

Verification rules the automated tests will apply:  
• The directory /home/user/localization/fr_FR must exist.  
• The file /home/user/localization/fr_FR/messages.po must exist and contain exactly one (and only one) “Project-Id-Version” header with the value “1.3”.  
• The log file /home/user/localization/update.log must exist and consist of exactly one line:  
  2023-07-01 10:00 Updated fr_FR translation to version 1.3  
  (followed by a single trailing newline).  
• No other files or directories should be added or modified.

Hint: a typical solution requires only 2–3 shell commands (create directory, copy, and edit with a stream editor or redirection).
truth:
Initial state before the agent starts:

1. /home/user/localization/templates/messages.pot  
   Exact content (including trailing newline):

   msgid ""  
   msgstr ""  
   "Project-Id-Version: 1.2\n"  
   "Report-Msgid-Bugs-To: you@example.com\n"  
   "POT-Creation-Date: 2023-06-30 09:00+0000\n"  
   "PO-Revision-Date: YEAR-MO-DA HO:MI+ZONE\n"  
   "Language-Team: \n"  
   "MIME-Version: 1.0\n"  
   "Content-Type: text/plain; charset=UTF-8\n"  
   "Content-Transfer-Encoding: 8bit\n"

2. No other files or directories exist under /home/user/localization/.

Expected final state after successful task completion:

• /home/user/localization/fr_FR/ exists with permissions 755 (default for mkdir ‑p).  
• /home/user/localization/fr_FR/messages.po exists.  
  Content must be identical to the original template except that the “Project-Id-Version” header reads “1.3” and appears only once in the file. All other lines remain unchanged.  
• /home/user/localization/update.log exists with permissions 644 (default when created via redirection) and contains exactly:  
  2023-07-01 10:00 Updated fr_FR translation to version 1.3\n

The test harness will diff the files byte-for-byte against these expectations.
